name: Be-my-Valentine Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-cup glass measuring cup, stir together water and strawberry gelatin until dissolved.
2. Cook on high for 1½ to 2 minutes without stirring.
3. Add vanilla ice cream to the hot mixture and stir until completely melted.
4. Chill the mixture for 35-40 minutes, stirring twice during chilling (the mixture should mound when dropped from a spoon).
5. Pour chilled ice cream mixture into pie shell.
6. Chill for about 4 hours or until set.
7. If desired, arrange milk chocolate kisses in a heart shape on top of the pie.
Serves 8.
